screen.minecraftosc.config.title: MinecraftOSC Config
screen.minecraftosc.config.subtitle: Single-column layout with scrolling. Changes are saved to the Forge common config.
screen.minecraftosc.config.footer_hint: Use the mouse wheel to scroll. Separate multiple values with commas.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.listen_p: OSC UDP listening port. Valid range: 1-65535.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.accepted: Separate multiple addresses with commas, for example /vrchat/chat, /chatbox/input.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.allow_an: When enabled, the sender whitelist check is skipped.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.allowed_: Separate multiple IPs with commas, for example 127.0.0.1, ::1.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.chat_pre: This prefix is prepended to the actual chat message sent by the local player.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.max_mess: Messages longer than this are trimmed during permission checks.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.max_queu: Capacity of the message queue waiting to be sent into Minecraft.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.max_retr: Maximum retry attempts after a chat send failure.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.retry_de: Delay in ticks between retry attempts.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.rate_lim: Maximum messages allowed inside the rate-limit window.
Length of the rate-limit window in seconds.
screen.minecraftosc.config.hint.max_disp: Maximum queued messages processed in a single client tick.
